markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gather feedback on GrowthX's partnership with prophecy.io to improve content strategy and delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy.io partnered with GrowthX in Dec 2024 to scale content creation using AI, moving from 1-3 articles/month to 5-7/week](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Content quality and relevance improved over time through upstream topic approval and feedback cycles](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [GrowthX is viewed as a strategic partner, not just for SEO execution but overall content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [New GrowthX platform will provide more transparency and control over content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Background and Goals

  - [Prophecy.io engaged GrowthX in Nov 2024 to scale content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Wanted to move from manual process (1-3 articles/month) to AI-assisted (40-50/week)](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Initial concerns about volume vs quality and ability to review high output](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Normalized to 5-7 articles/week, focusing on right technical level and topics](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)

### Content Generation Process Evolution

  - [Added upstream topic approval step to ensure relevance](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Improved calibration on technical depth and Prophecy-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Saw consistent improvements in writing quality after feedback](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Shifted from keyword-focused to topic cluster approach for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Performance Reporting and Benchmarks

  - [GrowthX responsive to requests for new performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Challenge in providing industry benchmarks due to Prophecy's niche](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Desire for more context on performance relative to Prophecy's historical data](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Overall positive trend in organic traffic attributed to GrowthX partnership](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### New GrowthX Platform Preview

  - [Moving workflows from AirOps to proprietary platform](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Building comprehensive, editable artifacts (personas, guidelines) into system](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Will allow partners more visibility and control over content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [Potential for partners to experiment with different inputs and see results](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule deep dive on new GrowthX platform features with account team](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
  - [Discuss strategy for leveraging accumulated content (e.g. gated content, niche topics)](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Continue refining artifacts and topic selection process](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Explore potential for Prophecy to access platform for internal content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zmEEFpNyVZMs3yQNHhAzR5stu18316sX?tab=summary&timestamp=2083.0)
